_schema.purpose: wq-073 — single source-of-truth for bear/base/bull scenario definitions per page-type. Replaces inline SCENARIOS literals in capital.html + revenue.html. index.html does NOT use this file (it computes scenarios live from cumulative aggregator output via _buildScenarios — wq-063).
_schema.fetch_pattern: fetch('data/scenarios.json').then(r => r.json()).then(s => { window.SCENARIOS = s; if (window._initScenarios) window._initScenarios(); }).catch(() => { /* fallback retains the inline-default SCENARIOS already in code */ });

capex_view._doc: capital.html scenario definitions — cumulative 2023-25 capex view. revenue numbers reflect cumulative customer-spend bands; ratios are capex/revenue.

revenue_projection._doc: revenue.html scenario definitions — annual revenue + per-year multipliers for forward projections (2025/2026E/2027E). Bear case decelerates 2026/27; bull case accelerates.

capex_view.source: Editorial scenario bands; revenue 17/22/27 = ±15% sensitivity around cumulative customer revenue base. Cumulative capex held at $745B per cumulative engine (wq-071+072 retired the override; engine produces $766B which the published $745B rounds to).

revenue_projection.source: Editorial scenario assumptions; bear/bull growth ranges per AI Ledger projection methodology. 2025 multiplier=1.0 (anchor year); 2026/27 reflect scenario growth rate compounded.
